ShortDescription.Value: Show/Hide notification icons, add/remove Money, set Milestones, Mini HUD, Better Tooltips.

Publish.LongDescription:
#### Display toggles - [i] button - Instant hide/show **ALL** vanilla mouse-over tooltips. - 1-click - show/hide 1-way road arrows. - 1-click - hide/show road name or district.
#### Features - **Mini HUD**: custom tracker list for any problem; repeat clicking the icon will cycle and jump to all map spots. - **Notifications**: **Instant on/off** toggle for all city alert icons (ones covering the city). - Reduce visual stress while building (does not fix city problems for you). - Open full panel from the top-left button. - Start city with any Milestone. Trains now! Yes you can! Set Initial money if you want less for a challenge or more.
#### Money tools - Quick handy info: hover over bottom menu money/population tooltips for instant info chart (faster than opening Info view). - Manual: add/subtract money on the fly with hotkeys ([ or ]). - Optional automatic money refiller. Manual is still recommended. - Convert saves from Unlimited Money type to normal Limited Money.
Hotkeys - Shift+N = open/close panel (same as clicking on Top Left icon). - N = toggle all notification icons on/off (same as clicking on Toggle All * star button) - [ = Add Money - ] = Subtract Money - Hold the money hotkey to repeat instead of clicking many times.
### Important Notes - Check **Show Instructions** for more details or hover over each Options menu row > see details in the 3rd panel on the right. - Unlimited Money save: make a backup before converting the save. Mod cannot undo that conversion. - Install Achievement Fixer mod if you want Achievements while using mods, it was removed from this mod.
I hope you enjoy the new features, better performance, and safety checks!
### Support and feedback - Feedback is welcome through GitHub or Discord links on the right. - If you like effort put into free mods, please give a Like :) - 15 languages: Hello, Hallo, Hola, Bonjour, Ciao, こんにちは, 안녕하세요, Cześć, Olá, Olá, สวัสดี, Merhaba, Xin chào, 你好, 你好 - If anyone can make better thumbnail or screenshots, please let me know. - Mod is save safe and safe to remove. Does not use Harmony patch, safer/more compatible. Good for performance: lightweight for daily use.
### Thanks to all supporters and testers - River Mochi - author/maintainer - yenyang - locale tech feedback - Notices inspired by the orig. City Controller mod by Mbyron26. - Money View inspired by earlier mods by DanielNZ Show Text. - Dorkington - tester/feature suggestion - Brainium, Flightech, SonNathan - testers - UnMaestro - testing, German editor - Thumbnail photograph by Maryia Shedava at Mont Saint-Michel in Normandy, France: https://unsplash.com/photos/a-dog-poses-in-front-of-a-distant-castle-bEpjaU_CTcM
tags: Visual, UI UX tool tips,UI organize icons, Mini HUD view
Publish.ChangeLog: - Button for Recommended Starter set is now draggable mini-HUD. - Fix favorite star stroke width css warn - Fix mini-HUD pane - - Recent this week: - Draggable mini hud remembers position between game sessions. - Improved Mini HUD: display, size, and Dark/Glass panels (See Options MENU). - Opacity slider for minu-Hud panel (see Options menu). - Hud draggable position persists between game sessions.
